name: The White House
subject: President Trump Addresses the Nation at 9pm
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da06914478d4dc4e536c8d6fb0a55ad55da1c1a8ee4283adba06d569da2e1b0e163b13ae3c14b69d3abd067fda52ba45354e7

Tonight, President Donald J. Trump will address the Nation from Fort Myer, Virginia, on the South Asia strategy.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da069cb0a0137f622856a8130f418cdae6502df4ee095329093afb29f42adeef7636e78fe6ad170588d6e7358beb3c975041f
Watch live at 9:00pm EST.

-------------

Reforming the Federal Bureaucracy

Last week, President Trump signed an Executive Order that fulfilled his commitment to simplify the Federal environmental review and permitting for major infrastructure projects. The President’s action will ensure more timely and efficient infrastructure investments that will strengthen the American economy, make our country more competitive, create jobs and increase wages for workers, and reduce the costs of goods and services for our families.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da069fdddc7e610e166bf98b7bb3f86f73700a845ef6428a2801bfd2930163e883ea259470431bbc4ab3c4c432086fbde87df
Read more

President Trump and Attorney General Sessions Stand Up Against Lawless Sanctuary Cities

Last week, Attorney General Sessions delivered remarks outlining the danger of sanctuary policies, and the Trump Administration’s efforts to bring law and order to America’s communities.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da0698a29e9b7e216db7ca349fa7b4913cb9789d1e44116e524806bc6a74f2a7dba543acea74b624ca6999de0c35dae04fe8c
Read more

Vice President Pence's Trip to Latin America

Vice President Pence finished his trip to Central and South America. He spoke to business leaders about advancing prosperity and economic growth throughout the Western Hemisphere and said that Latin America's progress will mean more jobs and more growth in the United States of America.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da0694a36117e9e8d433872baec48f0faa9fdbd1989d7d66392968bf55272a26a896980221cef7fd5ab5b4e81f9bcd0195400
Watch the Recap Video

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence at Camp David | August 18, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS and VP TODAY

This afternoon, Vice President Pence will host students from Cornerstone Schools for a Great American Solar Eclipse viewing event at the Naval Observatory. Later, the President and the Vice President will participate in a swearing-in ceremony of Woody Johnson as the United States Ambassador to the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland.

Tonight, President Trump will address the Nation.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da069cb0a0137f622856a8130f418cdae6502df4ee095329093afb29f42adeef7636e78fe6ad170588d6e7358beb3c975041f
Watch live at 9:00pm EST.

Coming Up This Week

President Trump will travel to Arizona on Tuesday to tour the border and discuss securing our Nation. On Wednesday, the President will address the National Convention of the American Legion in Nevada.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da0693d07909b9ae691c691374260198f4d7bf1574b2111160bee99c387d49989828e8c5ac04f2b3a896448beaa2550487436
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14d3b9a2637da069c44b50636e3dca094f9b2509d3d2aae4af976029a8f191565b51ce8e282078277cf14e4d2657111003c57ab4fcf5684c
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d403b4e65ee443d5dd49ad0e67131dbbcbfed3a416f92986c55c47ae24c50dfd79bd4a00a5c24cb0b61628e3cc921e650e
Unsubscribe

name: Keith Ellison
subject: re: the symbols of our enemies (add your name)
body:
Racism has no home in the White House.
---
**Tell Trump to fire Seb Gorka, Stephen Miller, and every white supremacist in his administration.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fire-White-Supremacists1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170821_ke_nd&source=em_20170821_ke_nd")**

Derek --

As I've reflected on what happened in Charlottesville, I've been struck by the symbols that have been embraced by these white supremacists -- the flags of the Confederacy and of Nazi Germany -- and what it looks like to the men and women who serve our country today.

When we teach the history of the Civil War in my home state, we talk about the 1st Minnesota Volunteer Infantry. Eighty percent of the regiment gave their lives at Gettysburg -- where on the other side of the battle line stood Robert E. Lee and that Confederate flag.

During World War II, my grandfather trained black soldiers to fix airplanes and my father joined the Army at the age of 15. The enemy they fought against had that same swastika on their uniforms.

I cannot imagine what it must mean for the brave members of our military who wear our flag to see their Commander-in-Chief embrace those who would rally their hatred behind the symbols of America's enemies. They deserve to have a leader who is guided by the principles of our Constitution and a moral compass that is in tune with our American values.

That will never happen as long as Donald Trump continues to surround himself with bigots, white nationalists, and enablers of white supremacy. They work in the White House, and they sit with Trump in the Oval Office.

**Steve Bannon was just the beginning -- they all must go. Join us as we call on Trump to rid himself of the white supremacists in his midst:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fire-White-Supremacists1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170821_ke_nd&source=em_20170821_ke_nd")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523799/4067b0a/3d38fe1a7/7e6f1eb3/2494247858/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170821_ke_nd&source=em_20170821_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523799/4067b0a/3d38fe1a7/7e6f1eb0/2494247858/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170821_ke_nd&source=em_20170821_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523799/4067b0a/3d38fe1a7/7e6f1eb1/2494247858/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170821_ke_nd&source=em_20170821_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523799/4067b0a/3d38fe1a7/7e6f1ebe/2494247858/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170821_ke_nd&source=em_20170821_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: I'm making it official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I'm running for re-election. |
---

| | Peter,

Other than becoming a father and a husband, the greatest honor of my life is representing Indiana in the U.S. Senate: fighting for Hoosier families, our values, our health care, and the middle class.

We've accomplished a lot together in nearly six years, but there's still work to do, and I intend to finish what I started in Washington. **That 's why I'm proud to announce I'm running for re-election.**

You'll be hearing a lot from my team and me in the coming months, but I wanted to make sure you had the chance to see our first video of the campaign.

**[Will you take a moment to watch this and share it with friends?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27c7/7377f838/37abd3be/51fbc96b/4218857794/VEsH/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9Btc5R_PT3c&feature=youtu.be")** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27c7/7377f838/37abd3be/51fbc96b/4218857794/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9Btc5R_PT3c&feature=youtu.be")
---
**Winning this campaign is going to be tough, Peter, but with your support, I know we 'll make it.**

Thank you,

Joe

body:
A quick update from a very busy week ---------------------------------------------------------------
Peter,
Last week was a busy week, so we wanted to send you a quick recap of the news you may have missed.

1. Israel Ambassador visits Missouri.

On Wednesday, Eric welcomed Israel's Ambassador to the United States, Ron Dermer, to Missouri. View pictures and more information about the visit here (https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/posts/10155646211639747?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629) .

2. Eric called for State Senator Maria Chappelle-Nadal to resign or be removed by the Senate.

Read more on Senator Chappelle-Nadal's comments here (http://dailycaller.com/2017/08/17/missouri-senator-i-hope-trump-is-assassinated/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629) .

3. Eric toured the Jefferson City Correctional Center as part of the Council of State Governments Justice Center Face to Face initiative.

https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/videos/10155654945459747/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629

Watch the video of his visit here (https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/videos/10155654945459747/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629) .

4. Thanks to Sheena's efforts, Missouri's child abuse hotline now accepts out-of-state phone calls.

http://krcgtv.com/news/local/missouri-child-abuse-hotline-now-accepts-out-of-state-calls?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629

Read more here: http://krcgtv.com/news/local/missouri-child-abuse-hotline-now-accepts-out-of-state-calls?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629

5. On Saturday, Eric joined over 300 volunteers at Culver-Stockton to take part in a service day.
https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/posts/10155658066329747?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629

- Team Greitens

https://secure.ericgreitens.com/donate-now?campaign_id=cf6c19120a201c6aeb457d7cc304a5d2&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=bf90d92307-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_08_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-bf90d92307-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=bf90d92307) .
